mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in payroll employment signals weak labor market conditions that reduce corporate earnings visibility, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in residential construction (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) indicates strong demand fundamentals, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between HOUST and RSAFS shows Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above its 3-month moving average signals strengthening manufacturing activity, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in inflation (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% signals central bank policy tightening, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly contraction in GDP (GDPC1) combined with rising unemployment (UNRATE) indicates economic slowdown, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect between GDPC1 and UNRATE shows Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 4.5% signals tight labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite low unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below its 6-month moving average indicates weakening supply-side dynamics, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite declining INDPRO.
